topic_title: Next-Generation AI Agents for Real-World Applications in the Apply AI sectors (RIA) (Partnership in AI, Data and Robotics)
destination: Achieving open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies
eligibility_restrictions: Participation limited to legal entities established in EU Member States, Iceland, Norway, and associated countries: Canada, Israel, Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom. Entities controlled by non-eligible countries may be excluded unless guarantees are provided.
notes: Max project duration not explicitly stated in the topic text; 48 months is the standard maximum for large RIA actions under Horizon Europe. Verify against General Annex B for the applicable instrument constraints.
